name: itl-autopilot-backend
description: ITL AutoPilot™ Backend — QR Review Engine + AutoRefer + AI Voice + Identity Vault (Neon PostgreSQL)

scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {initializeDatabase} = require('./src/db/init'); const {seedDatabase} = require('./src/db/seed'); (async () => { await initializeDatabase(); await seedDatabase(); process.exit(0); })();"
